title: Driver-Race LambdaRank Specialist
summary: ROC AUC is a ranking metric, and pairwise AUC optimization is well aligned with ordering imminent pit laps above safe laps.
rationale: ROC AUC is a ranking metric, and pairwise AUC optimization is well aligned with ordering imminent pit laps above safe laps. LightGBM’s ranking API gives a direct way to train on grouped timelines instead of pointwise binary loss only.
implementation_hint: Train an `LGBMRanker` on groups defined by each Driver x Race sequence in causal order. Use integer relevance like next-lap stop > 2-3-lap imminent > others, then blend the ranker score with the existing classifier via out-of-fold rank averaging rather than raw probability averaging.
expected_effect: Improves ordering inside ambiguous stop windows where the current model finds the right region but misranks the exact lap.
risk: Ranker outputs are not calibrated, and bad group design can overweight long no-stop stretches.
